_comment: Shared env conventions live in ../settings.example.json: single decider, empty COMPACT_PLUS_* backends, and the PXPIPE_MODELS default. This demo adds only manual adapter command wiring.
_comment_SESSION_HEALTH_CHECK_COMMAND: Empty = adapter disabled. After installing the upstream health detection tool yourself, set this to the command of your choice for manual adapter invocation.
_comment_COMPACT_PLUS_CHECKPOINT_COMMAND: Empty = adapter disabled. After installing the upstream checkpoint/recovery tool yourself, set this to the command of your choice for manual adapter invocation.
_comment_PXPIPE_COMPRESS_COMMAND: Empty = adapter disabled. After installing the upstream compression proxy yourself, set this to the command of your choice for starting or wrapping that proxy.
